skill.name: PyCostAudit
skill.tagline: See where your Claude Code budget actually goes — then save 50-80%
skill.description: Track and optimize LLM costs across 15 hidden dimensions (file format 36x, operation type 55x, timing 30%, MCP 10-100x, etc.). The only tool that measures what actually costs money.

keyFeatures.name: 15-Dimension Tracking
keyFeatures.description: File format, operation type, timing, region, billing plan, MCP, GitHub ops, markdown overhead, data warehouse, timezone, currency, and more

keyFeatures.name: Hidden Cost Multipliers
keyFeatures.description: Reveals 36x file format variance, 55x operation type variance, 100x-1000x+ data warehouse costs

keyFeatures.name: Session-Based Analysis
keyFeatures.description: Group operations by context for root cause analysis and targeted optimization

useCases: Track where your Claude Code spending really goes
Monitor team costs with timezone-aware attribution

track_operation.description: Track a single LLM operation cost

analyze_daily.description: Get today's cost breakdown by dimension

analyze_session.description: Analyze a session's costs with recommendations

get_recommendations.description: Get cost optimization recommendations ranked by impact
